text: >> Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. >> So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Arkansas State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? >> Yes. So I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan?
